title: Fix VlProcess argument breaks DPI export
body:
Verilator's insertion of the VlProcess argument breaks any DPI export of that function.

E.g. with UVM:

```
Vt_uvm_todo__Dpi_Export__0.cpp: In static member function 'static void Vt_uvm_todo::m___05Fuvm_report_dpi(int, const char*, const char*, int, const char*, int)':
Vt_uvm_todo__Dpi_Export__0.cpp:32:14: error: could not convert '(Vt_uvm_todo__Syms*)__Vscopep->VerilatedScope::symsp()' from 'Vt_uvm_todo__Syms*' to 'VlProcessRe\
f' {aka 'std::shared_ptr<VlProcess>'}
   32 |     (*__Vcb)((Vt_uvm_todo__Syms*)(__Vscopep->symsp()), severity__Vcvt, id__Vcvt, message__Vcvt, verbosity__Vcvt, filename__Vcvt, line__Vcvt);
      |              ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      |              |
      |              Vt_uvm_todo__Syms*
```

Blocks #1538 runtime.

See also #4565

I'm not sure what VlProcess should be used by the call into the export; perhaps we need to save the current process as part of the DPI context.
code_blocks:
Vt_uvm_todo__Dpi_Export__0.cpp: In static member function 'static void Vt_uvm_todo::m___05Fuvm_report_dpi(int, const char*, const char*, int, const char*, int)':

f' {aka 'std::shared_ptr<VlProcess>'}
   32 |     (*__Vcb)((Vt_uvm_todo__Syms*)(__Vscopep->symsp()), severity__Vcvt, id__Vcvt, message__Vcvt, verbosity__Vcvt, filename__Vcvt, line__Vcvt);
      |              ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      |              |
      |              Vt_uvm_todo__Syms*
